ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., 1 Bedroom, 2 Bedroom) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "min_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Minimum number of bedrooms */,
  "max_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bedrooms */,
  "min_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Minimum number of bathrooms */,
  "max_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bathrooms */,
  "avg_area_sqft" INTEGER /* Average area in square feet for this property type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the property type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., A1, B1) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type of the unit */,
  "area_sqft" INTEGER /* Area of the unit in square feet */,
  "available_units" INTEGER /* Number of available units of this type */,
  "price_from" TEXT /* Starting price for the unit */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the unit */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the unit */,
  "view" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., city, ocean, garden) */,
  "furnishing_status" TEXT /* Furnishing status (e.g., unfurnished, partially furnished, fully furnished) */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the unit (e.g., open plan, split level) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the unit */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the price change applies to */,
  "price" TEXT /* New price of the unit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the new price becomes effective */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the price change */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the price change was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit reserved */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date when the reservation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the reservation */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent who made the reservation */,
  "reservation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the reservation in days */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reservation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES sales_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has opted in for marketing communications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation associated with the contract */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer purchasing the unit */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit being purchased */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was signed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., signed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the unit */,
  "payment_plan" TEXT /* Payment plan details (e.g., full payment, installment plan) */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Closing date of the sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent who handled the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contract was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES sales_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales agent */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales agent */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales agent was hired */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory or region the sales agent is responsible for */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the sales agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sales agent was hired */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sales agent's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract associated with the transaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, commission payment) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned by the sales agent */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES sales_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., balcony, pool access) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., interior, exterior, amenities) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_features_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multimedia_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of multimedia content */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the content belongs to */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., image, video, floor plan) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "content_category" TEXT /* Category of the content (e.g., image, video, floor plan) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_content_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales agent, property manager, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
